Example: *"I'm always frustrated when [...] because [...]"*

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Example Usage

# Show how the API / interface would work

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Module / Scope

Which part of OpenCrypto does this affect?

- [ ] `core/data_bridge` — Market data
- [ ] `core/shield_guard` — Risk management
- [ ] `core/position_manager` — Trade lifecycle
- [ ] `core/base_strategy` — Strategy interface
- [ ] `indicators/` — Technical / Smart Money indicators
- [ ] `backtest/` — Backtesting engine
- [ ] `plugins/` — Telegram, Charts, LLM
- [ ] New module / Other
